textAr: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ
textEn: O you the enwrapped one,
textTranslit: Yaw ayyuhal muzzammil

textAr: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
textEn: Stand up in prayer at night except a little,
textTranslit: Qumil laila illaa qaleelaa

textAr: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
textEn: half of it, or a little less,
textTranslit: Nisfahooo awinqus minhu qaleelaa

textAr: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
textEn: or a little more, and recite the Qur’an at a measured pace.
textTranslit: Aw zid 'alaihi wa rattilil Qur'aana tarteela

textAr: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
textEn: We will send down upon you a heavy Word.
textTranslit: Innaa sanulqee 'alika qawalan saqeelaa

textAr: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, worship at night is more effective and more conducive to proper recitation.
textTranslit: Inn naashi'atal laili hiya ashadddu wat anw wa aqwamu qeelaa

textAr: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
textEn: In the daytime, you have plenty of time for your worldly matters.
textTranslit: Inna laka fin nahaari sabhan taweelaa

textAr: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
textEn: And remember the Name of your Lord, and devote yourself completely to Him.
textTranslit: Wazkuris ma rabbika wa tabattal ilaihi tabteelaa

textAr: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
textEn: [He is] Lord of the east and the west; none has the right to be worshiped except Him, so take Him as the Disposer of your affairs.
textTranslit: Rabbul mashriqi wal maghriibi laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fattakhizhu wakeelaa

textAr: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
textEn: Bear patiently what they say, and avoid them in a gracious manner.
textTranslit: Wasbir 'alaa maa yaqoo loona wahjurhum hajran jameelaa

textAr: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
textEn: Leave to Me the deniers who are having a life of luxury, and bear with them for a little while.
textTranslit: Wa zarnee walmukaz zibeena ulin na'mati wa mahhilhum qaleelaa

textAr: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
textEn: Indeed, We have heavy shackles and a Blazing Fire,
textTranslit: Inna ladainaaa ankaalanw wa jaheemaa

textAr: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
textEn: and food that chokes, and a painful punishment,
textTranslit: Wa ta'aaman zaa ghussa tinw wa'azaaban aleemaa

textAr: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
textEn: on the Day when the earth and the mountains will convulse, and the mountains will be like dunes of loose sand.
textTranslit: Yawma tarjuful ardu waljibaalu wa kaanatil jibaalu kaseebam maheelaa

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شَـٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
textEn: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger to be a witness over you, just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.
textTranslit: Innaa arsalnaaa ilaikum rasoolan shahidan 'alikum kamaaa arsalnaaa ilaa Fir'awna Rasoolna

textAr: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
textEn: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a severe punishment.
textTranslit: Fa'asaa Fir'awnur Rasoola fa akhaznaahu akhzanw wabeelaa

textAr: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
textEn: If you disbelieve, then how will you protect yourselves against a Day that will turn children’s hair gray?
textTranslit: Fakaifa tattaqoona in kafartum yawmany yaj'alul wildaana sheeba

textAr: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
textEn: It will cause the sky to break asunder. His promise will certainly be fulfilled.
textTranslit: Assamaaa'u munfatirum bih; kaana wa'duhoo maf'oola

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, this is a reminder; so whoever wills may take a way to his Lord.
textTranslit: Inna haazihee tazkiratun fa man shaaa'at takhaza ilaa Rabbihee sabeelaa

textAr: ۞ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَىِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ ۚ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا ۚ وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌۢ
textEn: Indeed, your Lord knows that you [O Prophet] stand up in prayer for nearly two-thirds of the night, or half of it, or one-third of it, as do others among your companions. Allah determines the night and the day; He knows that you [Muslims] cannot keep an accurate count of it, so He pardoned you. Recite then as much of the Qur’an as is easy for you [in the night prayers]. He knows that there are some among you who will be ill, and others traveling in the land, seeking the grace of Allah, and others fighting in Allah’s way. So recite as much of it as is easy for you; establish prayer and give zakah; and lend to Allah a goodly loan. Whatever good you send forth for yourselves, you will find it with Allah, much better in condition and much greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allah, for indeed Allah is All-Forgiving, Most-Merciful.
textTranslit: Inna Rabbaka ya'lamu annaka taqoomu adnaa min sulusa yil laili wa nisfahoo wa sulusahoo wa taaa'ifatum minal lazeena ma'ak; wal laahu yuqaddirul laila wanna haar; 'alima al lan tuhsoohu fataaba 'alaikum faqra'oo maa tayassara minal quraan; 'alima an sa yakoonu minkum mardaa wa aakharoona yadriboona fil ardi yabtaghoona min fadlil laahi wa aakharoona yuqaatiloona fee sabeelil laahi faqra'oo ma tayassara minhu wa aqeemus salaata wa aatuz zakaata wa aqridul laaha qardan hasanaa; wa maa tuqadimoo li anfusikum min khairin tajidoohu 'indal laahi huwa khayranw wa a'zama ajraa; wastaghfirul laahaa innal laaha ghafoorur raheem.
